description_long: This sculpture depicts a large, stylized human head with classical features, rendered in a weathered, cracked stone texture. The face is elongated and slightly abstracted, with prominent cheekbones, a defined nose, and deep-set eyes, giving it a solemn and contemplative expression. The surface is marked by numerous cracks and patina, suggesting age and exposure to the elements, while the coloration ranges from pale stone hues to subtle blue and green tints. The head is mounted on a rectangular plinth with a reddish-brown base and a lighter, rough-textured upper surface. The back of the head is flat and unfinished, emphasizing the frontal and profile views. The overall form is monumental and evokes the grandeur of ancient statuary, making it a striking focal point in any urban setting.
description: A large, weathered stone sculpture of a stylized human head with classical features, mounted on a rectangular plinth. The cracked surface and patina give it an ancient, monumental appearance.
description_view_0: The left profile of the head is visible, highlighting the pronounced nose, lips, and the cracked, textured surface. The reddish-brown plinth is partially visible at the base.
description_view_1: The frontal view shows the full face with deep-set eyes, defined lips, and a solemn expression. The cracks and color variations are most prominent here.
description_view_2: The right profile is shown, mirroring the left with similar facial features and surface texture. The plinth is again visible at the base.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the flat, unfinished back of the head and the full extent of the plinth, with the face only partially visible from this angle.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background, suggesting it could be installed in an outdoor urban or park environment.
